title: Vegetarian Baobing Custard
description: A sweet and creamy baobing dessert made with custard and topped with fresh fruits.
instructions: 2. In a medium bowl, whisk together the custard and friendly bouncy fruit.
3. Pour the mixture into a 9x13 inch baking dish.
4. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the edges are lightly golden brown.
5. Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
6. Drizzle the qq kid-friendly syrup over the top of the custard.
7. Sprinkle the friendly toppings and baobing over the top.
